title: The Killzone That Actually Makes Funded Traders Money
description: Stop trading at the wrong times. 85% of funded traders pass their challenges using just ONE killzone — and most beginners completely ignore it. R2F Trading breaks down the top 3 killzone mistakes destroying your account. Follow r2ftrading.com for daily ICT setups, order block breakdowns, and smart money concepts that actually work in 2026.
script: You're not failing prop challenges because of your strategy. You're failing because you're trading at the WRONG TIME. 85% of funded traders use just one killzone. And it's probably not the one you think. Mistake one — trading the Asian session like it's London. Almost no smart money moves there. It's a liquidity TRAP. You're entering. They're building. Big difference. Mistake two — missing the New York killzone open. 8 to 10 AM EST. That's where fair value gaps fill. That's where order blocks get tapped. That's where funded accounts are BUILT. Mistake three — trading London close on a Friday. Liquidity dries up FAST after 12 PM EST. Spreads widen. Smart money is OUT. You're left holding a bag. The R2F Trading system calls Friday afternoons a no-trade zone — for good reason. One killzone. New York open. Master it. That's the R2F Trading edge. Follow R2F Trading for a new setup every single day. Link in bio at r2ftrading.com.
